title: Peck's Bad Boy
writer: Irvin S. Cobb, George W. Peck, Sam Wood
actors: Jackie Coogan, Wheeler Oakman, Doris May
plot: Trouble and havoc seem to trail Little Henry Peck wherever he goes and only his dear mother understands him. But when young Henry's pranks get his big sister's boyfriend, Dr. Martin, arrested, dad decides that the boy must be puni...
